# CWE-184 positive: incomplete disallowed keyword list
lang: go
file: CWE-184-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"strings"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

var blocked = []string{"drop", "delete"}

// CWE-184 Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs
// Vulnerable line: blocklist misses uppercase and synonym verbs.
func RunReportQuery(c *gin.Context) {
	sqlish := strings.ToLower(c.PostForm("filter"))
	for _, word := range blocked {
		if strings.Contains(sqlish, word) {
			c.JSON(http.StatusBadRequest, gin.H{"error": "blocked"})
			return
		}
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"accepted": sqlish})
}
